prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access
Create a project management tool with tasks, teams, Kanban board, and deadlines
Build an e-commerce store with products, cart, checkout, and order tracking
Create a blog platform with posts, comments, categories, and author profiles
Build an HR management system with employees, departments, leave requests, and payroll
Create a restaurant management app with menu items, orders, tables, and reservations
Build a learning management system with courses, students, quizzes, and certificates
Create an inventory management system with products, warehouses, stock levels, and suppliers
Build a helpdesk ticketing system with tickets, agents, priorities, and SLA tracking
Create a real estate listing platform with properties, agents, inquiries, and virtual tours
